scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) delegates to Reader overload and returns Document on successful parse
scenarios.precondition: TreeBuilder stub returns a dummy Document; uses real Parser(htmlParser())
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is the same instance provided by TreeBuilder.parse
pseudocode: TEST TC01_O1 parseInput String overload successful

Parser parser = new Parser(new StubTreeBuilderReturningDoc()); String html="

"; String baseUri="http://example.com";

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) returns Document when TreeBuilder.parse succeeds
scenarios.precondition: Simple stub TreeBuilder that returns a new Document; no mocking framework used
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document equals the stub's created Document instance
pseudocode: TEST TC02_O2 parseInput Reader overload successful
Reader reader = new StringReader("<div/>"); Parser parser = new Parser(new StubTreeBuilderReturningDoc()); String uri="base";

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) throws UncheckedIOException when TreeBuilder.parse throws one
scenarios.precondition: Stub TreeBuilder.parse throws new UncheckedIOException(new IOException()); "why mocking is necessary: to simulate I/O error"
scenarios.expectedResult: throws java.io.UncheckedIOException; no Document returned; lock is released
pseudocode: TEST TC03_O2 parseInput Reader overload unchecked-io-exception
Parser parser = new Parser(new StubTreeBuilderThrowingUncheckedIO()); Reader reader=new StringReader("x");

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) throws NullPointerException when inputHtml is null
pseudocode: TEST TC04_O2 parseInput Reader overload null-reader
Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); Reader reader=null; String uri="u";

scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) accepts null baseUri and returns Document
scenarios.precondition: Stub TreeBuilder returning dummy; baseUri null
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is stub instance; baseUri passed as null to TreeBuilder.parse
pseudocode: TEST TC05_O1 parseInput String overload null-baseUri
Parser parser = new Parser(new StubTreeBuilderRecordingUri()); String html="<a/>"; String baseUri=null;
assert doc == StubTreeBuilderRecordingUri.DUMMY_DOC; assert StubTreeBuilderRecordingUri.lastUri == null;
